V SS/ ASTM A 351 Gr CF8M/ SS 316 L d) Shaft SS-316 EN-8 (BS-970) AISI 420 e) Shaft sleeve SS-410 SS- 410 Duplex SS f) Mechanical seal --------- Manufacturer's standard ------------ g) Base plate ------ MS fabricated IS-2062 with epoxy coating ------ 1 Retain the details of fresh water or sea water as applicable Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 4 (Piping, Valves, Thermal Insulation and Miscellaneous Systems/ Equipment) 4 -25 4.3.3.2 Heat exchangers i) Type : Plate type, single pass ii) Design pressure : 2 times working pressure or 1.5 times shut off head of respective pumps, whichever is higher. iii) Material of construction : For fresh water For seawater a) Heat transfer plate : SS-AISI-316 Titanium b) Compression/ fixed plates, : -------------- IS::2062 ---------------- movable pressure plate, support beam/ column c) Guide rail : ------- IS-2062 with SS cladding ------- d) Plate gasket : ------------- Nitrile Rubber ------------- e) Nozzle and flanges : -------------- Carbon steel ------------ f) Nozzle flange gasket : -- 3 mm wire inserted Red Rubber -- g) Nozzle flange bolts/ nuts : ------- SA 193 B7/SA 194 2 H -------- h) Name plate : ------------- AISI-316 ------------- i) Tightening rods : ------ IS-1367 or equivalent ------- - Double sealing arrangement should be provi ded at outer edge and around ports to avoid intermixing of fluids. The inter-space should be vented to atmosphere. - Plate thickness should be adequate to withstand all operating conditions but not less than 0.6 mm. - Frame of exchanger should be designed so that 25% additional plates can be added in future. - Flanges shall be per ANSI B 16.5 or equivalent. - Thickness of pressure and frame plates as per ASME sec. VIII Div. I. - Minimum corrosion allowance for heat exchanger parts shall be 1.6 mm. - After pressing all the plates shall be tested by light box/vacuum/air chamber test as per manufacturer’s standard practice. Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 4 (Piping, Valves, Thermal Insulation and Miscellaneous Systems/ Equipment) 4 -26 - The corrosion allowance fo r the heat exchanger parts such as pressure parts (support plates), nozzles, sliding channels
